title: Fireflies MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Fireflies MCP Server for Claude
Extract valuable insights from meeting transcripts and summaries
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Fireflies
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `meetings` `fireflies` `transcription` `notes` `ai-assistant`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status fireflies
```

## Config
```json
{
  "fireflies": {
    "url": "https://api.fireflies.ai/mcp",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status fireflies
